intro: Between April 13 and 28, 2026, ZCyberNews covered 20 cybercrime incidents, with financial services and government sectors most frequently targeted across global, Caribbean, Latin American, Southeast Asian, and United States regions. The reporting featured LockBit, Chinese Transnational Organized Crime, and REvil as distinct threat actors. Of the 20 articles, 13 were classified as high severity, five as medium, and two as informational.
